text: Title: RELATIONSHIP BETWEEN THE MENTAL MATURITY FOR MARRIAGE OF YOUNG MEN AND THEIR LEVEL OF EMOTIONAL INTELLIGENCE The main purpose of this paper is to examine whether the mental maturity for marriage of young men is related to their emotional intelligence. Mental maturity for marriage consists of three elements in sum: self-acceptance, inner integration and attitudes towards marriage and family life. 90 young men took part in our research. Our findings have shown that young men with higher psychological maturity for marriage have a significantly higher emotional intelligence than those with lower psychological maturity for marriage. Higher emotional intelligence means not only being aware of emotional states but also being able to use experienced emotions to deal with life situations that arise.
explanation: The passage resembles a concise, template-like abstract with generic phrasing and limited methodological detail (e.g., no measurement instruments, scales, or statistics). This pattern is common in AI-generated text, though not conclusive.
